title: Knowing who made dashboard
excerpt:
Hi Experts, 
I am trying to find out who made dashboard, 
it is hard to find activity log… Is there any good way of it? 
Regards 
Kevin

posts.author: kevin_jun (kevin jun)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to find out who made dashboard,
it is hard to find activity log… Is there any good way of it?

Regards
Kevin

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Kevin

If you are on Enterprise, the content delivery feature allows you to see who the dashboard owner is!

If you are not on Enterprise, you can narrow down who might be the dashboard creator by looking at who is the dashboard owner, i.e. who has the blue crown next to their name in the board subscribers. That said, board owners can grant ownership to other team members, so it might not be super accurate…

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @kevin_jun - if you click here (indicated in red outline), can you see the dashboard members and/or owners?

1a9c6d2cf48bff780774bbac34e8cc6a9f0b983f982×350 17.3 KB

posts.author: kevin_jun (kevin jun)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca. No nothing there. It is Pro plan

Regards Kevin

Kevin Jun
+82 10 3695 0821

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks Kevin! You should be able to click Dashboard members:

Are you able to send another screenshot of what appears when you click the icon I outlined in red?

Thanks for your help on this!

posts.author: kevin_jun (kevin jun)
posts.cookedHtml:
ok… thanks Now I am able to find who is the owner and who made it. Bianca.
Thanks a lot Regards Kevin

posts.cookedHtml: Great to hear! No problem

posts.author: WasayNoori (Wasay Noori)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,
I have the same question and am on Enterprise plan. As the dashboard owner, I can make others also the owners. So, by looking at the owners list, how do we answer the question “who created the dashboard” ??
